msg: warning: Variable info is used uninitialized!
reasoning: Classic variability bug: 'int info' is declared at line 7 under #ifdef BB_FEATURE_LS_FILETYPES, initialized to 0 at line 11 only under #ifdef BB_FEATURE_LS_USERNAME, and used at line 16 (printf("%d", info)) under #ifdef BB_FEATURE_LS_FILETYPES. When BB_FEATURE_LS_FILETYPES is defined but BB_FEATURE_LS_USERNAME is not, info is declared but never initialized before use — a genuine uninitialized read. The vbdb source (b273d665181.c) marks line 16 with '// ERROR', confirming this is a known variability bug. The presence condition def(BB_FEATURE_LS_FILETYPES)&&!def(BB_FEATURE_LS_USERNAME) is correctly constrained — it exactly matches the configuration space where info is undeclared/uninitialized at the point of use. Known bug.
